nasb.text: And there were flashes of lightning and sounds and peals of thunder; and there was a great earthquake, such as there had not been since man came to be upon the earth, so great an earthquake was it, and so mighty.

esv.text: And there were flashes of lightning, rumblings, peals of thunder, and a great earthquake such as there had never been since man was on the earth, so great was that earthquake.

cnv.text: 於是有閃電、響聲、雷轟和大地震，自從地上有人以來，沒發生過這麼大的地震，

ccb.text: 随后雷电交加，伴随着巨响，还有空前剧烈的大地震。

csbs.text: 随后有闪电、声音和雷鸣，又发生了大地震，自从地上有人以来，没有发生过如此大、如此厉害的地震。
